---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: <short summary>"
labels: ["feature", "enhancement", "todo"]
---

## 🧱 User Story
As a <type of user>, I want <goal or functionality> so that <reason or value>.

## 🎯 Description
Provide a clear description of the feature.  
Explain what problem it solves or what value it adds.

## 🧩 Technical Details
- Describe any classes, APIs, or modules to update or create.
- Include relevant technologies (Spring Boot, Kafka, Vault, etc.)
- Mention integration points (if any).

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The new feature performs as expected.
- [ ] Unit/integration tests are added and passing.
- [ ] Documentation is updated (README / OpenAPI / Wiki).
- [ ] CI/CD build passes successfully.

## 🧠 Additional Notes
Add any architectural references, diagrams, or dependencies here.

## 🏷️ Labels
`feature`, `backend`, `enhancement`

## 👥 Assignee
@<developer>
